data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Adobe employs modern tools for real-time monitoring and detection of potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning and AI through tools like Splunk and CrowdStrike.

data.title: Robust Data Encryption
data.description: All user data and communications are encrypted both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption standard and SSL/TLS protocols.

data.title: Dedicated Security Operations Center
data.description: 24/7 monitoring and incident response to manage and mitigate security risks effectively.
data.technical_spec: SIEM systems and incident response protocols.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security assessments and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Third-party audits and internal security teams.

data.title: Comprehensive End-User Authentication
data.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is mandatory for all account holders.
data.technical_spec: Supports authentication apps, SMS codes, and hardware tokens.
